events.name: Spring 2026
events.nv_divisions: NV 2Gun / NV PCC — Night Vision Only
events.entry_fee: $100 per division · $50 second division (same competitor, max 2)
events.payment_note: PayPal — details sent by email after PractiScore registration. Check spam if payment email doesn't arrive. Registration is NOT complete until PayPal payment received.
